message:
feat(provider-test): add native adapter contract tests (bd-3uqg.8.2)

Add tests/provider_native_contract.rs with 20 contract tests validating
request payload shape, auth header construction, tool-schema translation,
and response event decoding for Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Cohere, and
5 OpenAI-compatible presets (groq, deepseek, xai, perplexity, fireworks).

Cross-provider invariant tests verify all native providers produce Done
events and send Content-Type: application/json.

All tests use MockHttpServer with SSE body generators for deterministic
offline provider testing. Passes cargo check, clippy -D warnings, and fmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
